alerts.headline: 🏦 FOMC MEETING in 21d (May 6-7): Fed rate decision — gold sensitive to rate path guidance amid tariff-driven inflation
alerts.detail: Fed caught between tariff-driven inflation (hawkish) and slowing growth (dovish). Gold benefits if Fed pauses or signals cuts.

alerts.headline: 📉 GOLD-STOCKS CORRELATION BREAKDOWN: Gold fell with equities on Apr 2-3 — unusual risk-off liquidation vs traditional safe-haven behavior
alerts.detail: Gold typically rises when stocks fall. Post-Liberation Day, forced liquidation to cover margin calls temporarily pushed gold lower. Historically resolves bullishly as safe-haven demand resumes.

alerts.headline: ⚡ LIBERATION DAY: Trump announces sweeping reciprocal tariffs (Apr 2) — gold surges as flight-to-safety demand spikes
alerts.detail: 10% baseline tariff on all imports + higher country-specific rates. Gold rally reflects dollar weakness and safe-haven demand.

alerts.headline: ⚠️ BELOW 50-DAY MA: Gold at $4,802 trading under 50-DMA ($4,893) — watch for support
alerts.detail: Price below 50-day moving average can signal short-term bearish momentum.

alerts.headline: 🟡 ATH PULLBACK: Gold is 9.7% below its all-time high of $5,318 — historically a re-entry zone
alerts.detail: Gold set its ATH of $5,318 on 2026-01-29. Pullbacks of 8-20% below ATH have historically been strong accumulation opportunities in bull markets.
